<!-- What problem does this PR solve? Keep the summary public-safe. -->

## Changes / 変更内容

<!-- List the smallest coherent set of changes. -->

## Tests / 検証

<!-- List only commands that actually ran and their results. Mark skipped checks as not checked. -->

- [ ] Scanner regression tests passed, or are explicitly marked not checked.
- [ ] Marker scan passed, or is explicitly marked not checked.

## Review notes / レビュー観点

<!-- Call out security boundaries, edge cases, and documentation contracts. -->

## Risks / 残リスク

<!-- State residual risks after the performed checks. -->

## Unknowns / 未確認事項

<!-- Use "None" only when there are no known unknowns. -->

## Cost impact / 費用影響

<!-- State whether this uses a paid API, model, SaaS, or cloud resource. -->

## Gate and public-safety checklist

- [ ] Public-facing text uses synthetic examples and redacts protected material.
- [ ] The PR contains no credentials, OAuth values, private repository names, raw logs, private screenshots, customer or production data, or local absolute paths.
- [ ] Requirement, release/tag, workflow, cost, and external-data gates were checked; any applicable approval is linked.
- [ ] If `SKILL.md` or `examples/` changed, the full diff and hidden-Unicode check were reviewed.
